variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 16385 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 16385 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 16385 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.

variants.title: Donaldson P951742 Air Filter, Primary Round Powercore | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 16385
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P951742 Air Filter, Primary Round Powercore is engineered to deliver reliable performance and durability across a wide range of applications. Designed with high-quality materials, it ensures consistent functionality while meeting demanding operational requirements. Whether used in industrial, automotive, or heavy-duty settings, this component offers dependable operation and longevity. Its versatile design makes it suitable for various uses, supporting system efficiency and overall performance.

variants.title: Mann Filter CP 27 001 Air Filter | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 16385
variants.description: High-quality MANN-FILTER air filters for clean air intake and optimum protection for your engine, mass air flow sensor & other sensitive components / They meet requirements of modern engine technology. Highest dirt holding capacity and dirt separation efficiency, low flow resistance and high pleat stability ensure functional reliability during the entire service interval.

variants.title: Fleetguard AF4265 Air Filter | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 16385
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF4265 air filter meets or exceeds the customers’ technical specifications for air filtration systems including factors such as: media fiber size, shape, pore size, thickness, weave and mechanical strength.
